narrative.description: Activision's remaster bundles Spyro's three PS1 adventures with rebuilt geometry and modern lighting while preserving glide traversal, gem collectathons, and whimsical dragon rescue objectives.
narrative.core_loop: Glide and flame through hub worlds, collect gems and dragons, defeat bosses to unlock new realms, and revisit levels for 100% completion.

mechanics.map_notes: Three remastered Spyro games packaged as a unified collection.
mechanics.expression: Three remastered Spyro games packaged as a unified collection.

mechanics.map_notes: Spyro's glide extends jumps across chasms and enables aerial repositioning.
mechanics.expression: Spyro's glide extends jumps across chasms and enables aerial repositioning.

mechanics.map_notes: Gems, dragons, and eggs gate realm access and completion percentage.
mechanics.expression: Gems, dragons, and eggs gate realm access and completion percentage.

mechanics.map_notes: Artisans and subsequent hubs unlock via boss clears and gem totals.
mechanics.expression: Artisans and subsequent hubs unlock via boss clears and gem totals.

mechanics.map_notes: Balloonists and portals require defeating realm bosses.
mechanics.expression: Balloonists and portals require defeating realm bosses.

mechanics.map_notes: Flame breath and charge attacks destroy enemies and break chests.
mechanics.expression: Flame breath and charge attacks destroy enemies and break chests.

mechanics.map_notes: Thieves, skill points, and hidden areas extend replay value.
mechanics.expression: Thieves, skill points, and hidden areas extend replay value.

mechanics.map_notes: Lava, water, and cliff edges punish mis-timed glides.
mechanics.expression: Lava, water, and cliff edges punish mis-timed glides.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses like Gnasty Gnorc follow learnable attack cycles.
mechanics.expression: Bosses like Gnasty Gnorc follow learnable attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Late-game bosses shift arenas and attack patterns.
mechanics.expression: Late-game bosses shift arenas and attack patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Sparx dragonfly absorbs hits before Spyro takes damage.
mechanics.expression: Sparx dragonfly absorbs hits before Spyro takes damage.

mechanics.map_notes: Fairy checkpoints respawn Spyro after death.
mechanics.expression: Fairy checkpoints respawn Spyro after death.

mechanics.map_notes: Large enemies wind up before charge attacks.
mechanics.expression: Large enemies wind up before charge attacks.

mechanics.map_notes: Roll charge clears lines of fodder enemies.
mechanics.expression: Roll charge clears lines of fodder enemies.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Spyro Reignited Trilogy through its core platformer loop.
